decks.traditionalDesc: The Marseille — earliest standardised deck. Pip-style minors, austere line-art majors.
decks.modernDesc: Rider–Waite — the lingua franca. Fully illustrated minors; Pamela Colman Smith's visionary art.
decks.contemporaryDesc: New decks balance inclusivity, personal mythology, and evolving spiritual vocabularies.
